title: Project Setup and Database Schema
summary: Create the Next.js scaffold in the project path. Install Tailwind CSS v4, Lucide React, and initial shadcn/ui components. Configure Neon Postgres with Drizzle ORM, defining dog_shelter_dogs and dog_shelter_inquiries tables. Create a database seed script.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Next.js 16 app exists at `projects/dog-shelter-landing-page-2026-03-19-20-30`.
- Drizzle configured with table prefix `dog_shelter_`.
- `db/schema.ts` contains `dogs` and `inquiries` tables.
- `db/index.ts` connects to Neon via `DATABASE_URI`.
- `seed.ts` is functional and inserts dummy data.
- Project builds and runs locally.

title: Core Layout Component Implementation
summary: Build the foundational shell of the landing page. Create a sticky navigation header with anchor links and a footer with shelter contact details.
acceptanceCriteria:
- `app/layout.tsx` integrates the new Header and Footer components.
- `Header.tsx` is sticky and contains navigation links (O nas, Nasi podopieczni, Adopcja, Wsparcie, Kontakt).
- `Footer.tsx` contains shelter contact details, NIP/KRS info, and social links.
- Components are fully responsive using Tailwind CSS.

title: Static Informational Sections Implementation
summary: Implement the static sections of the landing page to provide information to users about the shelter and how they can help.
acceptanceCriteria:
- `HeroSection.tsx` includes an above-the-fold banner with primary CTAs.
- `AboutSection.tsx` includes mission statement and shelter overview.
- `AdoptionProcess.tsx` explains the step-by-step adoption procedure.
- `SupportSection.tsx` provides donation info (bank transfers, 1% tax, volunteering).
- All sections are integrated into `app/page.tsx` and linked to via the Header.

title: Dogs Showcase Implementation
summary: Build the data-driven section that queries the database for non-adopted dogs and displays them in reusable cards.
acceptanceCriteria:
- `DogsShowcase.tsx` Server Component fetches dogs where `is_adopted = false` using Drizzle.
- `DogCard.tsx` component displays individual dog details (name, breed, age, description, image).
- Missing images handle graceful fallbacks.
- Section is integrated into `app/page.tsx`.

title: Contact Form and Server Action Implementation
summary: Build the client-side contact form with validation, and wire it to a Next.js Server Action to persist inquiries into the database.
acceptanceCriteria:
- `ContactForm.tsx` uses `react-hook-form` and Zod for client-side validation.
- `app/actions/inquiry.ts` validates data and inserts it into `dog_shelter_inquiries`.
- Form includes error states and success messages.
- Form integrated into the page.

title: Refinement, Accessibility, and Deployment Configuration
summary: Perform final visual and functional testing, fix any layout bugs, ensure accessibility, and verify deployment configuration.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Semantic HTML and ARIA labels are properly set.
- Responsive design works seamlessly across mobile, tablet, and desktop.
- Environment variables documented in `.env.example`.
- Next.js build and Drizzle migrations configured for deployment target.
